Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

Class Hypothesis.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.Hypothesis.Builder
Enclosing class:

public static class Hypothesis.Builder extends Object
Builder for Hypothesis.

  • Method Details

    • name

      public Hypothesis.Builder name(String name)
      Sets the hypothesis name.
      Parameters:
      name - hypothesis name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • description

      public Hypothesis.Builder description(String description)
      Sets the description.
      Parameters:
      description - hypothesis description
      Returns:
      this builder

    • category

      public Hypothesis.Builder category(Hypothesis.Category category)
      Sets the category.
      Parameters:
      category - root cause category
      Returns:
      this builder

    • failureMode

      public Hypothesis.Builder failureMode(String failureMode)
      Sets the failure mode name.
      Parameters:
      failureMode - OREDA failure mode name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • priorProbability

      public Hypothesis.Builder priorProbability(double prior)
      Sets the prior probability.
      Parameters:
      prior - probability in range 0 to 1
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addEvidence

      public Hypothesis.Builder addEvidence(Hypothesis.Evidence evidence)
      Adds an evidence item.
      Parameters:
      evidence - evidence to add
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addExpectedSignal

      public Hypothesis.Builder addExpectedSignal(String parameterPattern, Hypothesis.ExpectedBehavior behavior, double weight, String rationale)
      Adds an expected diagnostic signal.
      Parameters:
      parameterPattern - parameter alias or pipe-separated aliases to match
      behavior - expected behavior for the matched parameter
      weight - relative importance, normally 0.1 to 5.0
      rationale - engineering rationale for the signal
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addAction

      public Hypothesis.Builder addAction(String action)
      Adds a recommended action.
      Parameters:
      action - corrective action
      Returns:
      this builder

    • copy

      public Hypothesis.Builder copy()
      Creates a deep copy of this builder, so the original template remains unmodified.
      Returns:
      a new builder with copied state

    • build

      public Hypothesis build()
      Builds the hypothesis.
      Returns:
      constructed hypothesis
